question: What is the most appropriate conclusion about the defect rate over the years shown?

options.A: The defect rate showed only minor changes over the period
options.B: There was a large surge in the defect rate over the period
options.C: The defect rate stayed exactly the same every year
options.D: The trend in the defect rate cannot be determined from this chart

explanation: The y-axis uses a very tight range (5.49–5.93%) instead of a more informative 0–10% context, which visually exaggerates variability. The actual net change is about 0.02% over the period, which is modest in the full context.
